raw_text: manuel moya perez aeronautical engineer amman, jordan telephone: +34 659809847 (spanish) + 962 (0) 795735688 (jordanian) e-mail: manuelm.p go hotmail.com (private) proyectos @sdle.es (company) personal profile a driven and diligent individual who has a highly developed passion for aerospace. keen on facing new challenges and committed to success. possesses distinguished analytical skills and a number of engineering resources used to pursue the excellence in every solution. after countless aerospace group projects, has developed teamwork and leadership capabilities together with a highly effective and confident public speaking. employment history jan 2019 current july 2017 jan 2019 may 2016 july 2017 feb 2016 - dec 2016 project manager - sdle (jordan) centauro project manager on site (in jordan). assurance of quality for the production process in the costumer's facilities. report and assess non-conformities for the special tools and spares. solution of technical problems. production plan for the maintenance tasks as per the maintenance manual and the status of the vehicles. liaison between the costumer (jordan armed forces) and sdle headquarter. responsible for the risk management and prevention. manufacturing engineer - general dynamics - sbs (uk) technical assistance on shore at new factory of our costumer (wales). production plan and management of technicians in every task of the manufacturing process. assurance of the quality. research of cause root of non-conformities. ils area of general dynamics - sbs development of the sv ascod programme technical publications and lsa tasks, i.e. the support of mod armoured fighting vehicles in maintenance tasks in uk as well as the updating of rcm for all maintenance tasks (preventive and corrective) of the different systems of the vehicle. attitude controller for an uav (mugin) based on mpc (model predictive control) algorithm. grant in the automatic and control department of the technical engineering high school of the university of seville. this is a project developed by boeing in collaboration with the research group of eduardo fernandez camacho. jul 2015 - sep 2015 maintenance and certification of the arm systems p-3 orion 8 c-16 in moron de la frontera air base spanish air force. curricular internship of the university of seville (us). introduction about the different workshops which support all activities of maintenance of the different arm systems and detailed evaluation of oil filters as much from oil system as from the hpgu of turbojet ej-200 as in the development of theirs test bench. education qualifications oct 2014 dec 2016 sep 2010 - sep 2014 skills aeronautical engineering master (2 years plan) university of seville (us) aerospace engineering degree (4 years plan) university of seville (us) software & programming: matlab, simulink, visual basic, arduino, catia, pspice, stk (satellite toolkit), patran-nastran, ansys, fluent, festo fluidsim, ees, gsp, microsoft office (excel, word, access, power point), latex. pdmlink, eagle, csdb, lotus, baan, creo, ms project language: + spanish (native) + english (fluent) + french (basic) softs skills: empathy + self awareness + motivation + influence = teamwork success interests and extracurricular activities + driving license. + am very keen on practicing lots of sports such as athleticism, swimming and cycling. belong to a triathlon club. indeed, have participated in many competitions. enjoy listening to music and playing different instruments. moreover, graduated in professional musical education at the professional conservatory of seville in the guitar specialization and learnt to play the piano by myself. won several awards in guitar competitions and intended many musical perfection courses. + have developed particular projects with arduino by myself. gave private tuition to several pupils from different levels during my degree
